title: This App Lets You Use Android Auto in Any Car
summary: There's a wifi option as well: You need Headunit Reloaded Emulator running on the device that's displaying Android Auto, and the companion Wi-Fi Launcher app on your primary phone (driving the maps, apps, and info on the Android Auto screen).
